pokemon:rellor.name: Rellor
pokemon:rellor.summary: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.
It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.

pokemon:rabsca.name: Rabsca
pokemon:rabsca.summary: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.
An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.
